data.body: ROOT CAUSE: During TDD RED phase, the implementation doesn't exist yet. The agent writes a test for the not-yet-implemented feature. For shell scripts and skill files, the agent defaults to the easiest assertion: grep the source file for the expected string/function/pattern. This passes the RED requirement (test fails because the string doesn't exist yet) and turns GREEN when the implementation is added (string now exists). But the test never actually exercises the behavior — it only checks that the code was written.
